findings.title: Verified auth guard bypass
findings.summary: Local source review confirmed a missing localhost auth gate on a sensitive RPC path.
findings.fix_recommendation: Require the local auth gate before dispatching privileged RPC methods.

findings.title: Vendored fixture flagged by scanner
findings.summary: A test-only archive fixture was flagged even though it is not shipped in the runtime path.
findings.false_positive_reason: Fixture-only archive lives under test data and is outside the shipped pentest path.

findings.title: Bounded DAST lane intentionally skipped
findings.summary: No bounded local DAST target was present for this static-only fixture run.
findings.skip_reason: no allowed local DAST targets are present in scope

findings.title: Potential token-like string requires triage
findings.summary: Scanner output still requires a local source binding before it can be confirmed.
